title: althaea rosea var. sinensis
intro: Althaea rosea var. sinensis, also known as Chinese marsh mallow or Sinensis marsh mallow, is a plant species of the genus Althaea, native to China and used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and soothing effects, making it useful in treating a range of health conditions. The health benefits of Althaea rosea var. sinensis include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from digestive issues and respiratory problems. Althaea rosea var. sinensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal creams and ointments to take advantage of its soothing and anti-inflammatory properties.
